creator: johan@stromnet.se
text:
While it seems to work as you describe if I switch of HTTP now, it failed to migrate from my old config.

I restored an old backup of the file:
----
# This file is auto-generated by 'make config'.
# Options for curl-7.51.0_3
_OPTIONS_READ=curl-7.51.0_3
_FILE_COMPLETE_OPTIONS_LIST=CA_BUNDLE COOKIES CURL_DEBUG DEBUG DOCS EXAMPLES HTTP2 IDN IPV6 LDAP LDAPS LIBSSH2 METALINK PROXY PSL RTMP SMB TLS_SRP GSSAPI_BASE GSSAPI_HEIMDAL GSSAPI_MIT GSSAPI_NONE CARES THREADED_RESOLVER GNUTLS NSS OPENSSL POLARSSL WOLFSSL
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=CA_BUNDLE
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=COOKIES
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=CURL_DEBUG
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=DEBUG
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=DOCS
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=EXAMPLES
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=HTTP2
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=IDN
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=IPV6
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=LDAP
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=LDAPS
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=LIBSSH2
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=METALINK
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=PROXY
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=PSL
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=RTMP
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=SMB
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=TLS_SRP
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=GSSAPI_BASE
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=GSSAPI_HEIMDAL
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=GSSAPI_MIT
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=GSSAPI_NONE
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=CARES
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=THREADED_RESOLVER
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=GNUTLS
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=NSS
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=OPENSSL
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=POLARSSL
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=WOLFSSL
----

Built again using testport, which reports:
     HTTP=off: HTTP/HTTPS support
     HTTP2=off: HTTP/2 support (requires HTTP)

And now it does not work. 

A friend of mine who who also builds his ports using poudriere mentioned he hade the same experience, curl suddenly not working, noticing HTTP was unchecked. So not an isolated incident at least.

Even if curl itself works for me now, there was something weird going on with the options migrations on updates. Perhaps not directly curl related, but rather ports system in general?
